channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Debate Over New Infill Homes in Saskatoon's Historic Neighbourhoods
item.description: Saskatoon's historic neighbourhoods, home to century-old houses with distinctive architecture, are seeing a wave of new infill homes. These new constructions often feature modern designs, boxy structu...

item.title: Nigeria Pushes for State Police Reform to Tackle Insecurity
item.description: Nigeria don dey pursue serious diplomatic waka to get international support for im plan to set up State Police. Di move na part of government strategy to fight insecurity, build better trust between p...

item.title: Three Men Killed in San Diego Mosque Shooting, Suspected Teen Attackers Also Dead
item.description: On Monday, a tragic shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego resulted in the deaths of three men. Authorities report that both suspects, believed to be teenagers, were also killed during the incide...

item.title: Parliamentary Committee Summons NTA Chief Over NEET Paper Leak and Reforms
item.description: Political tensions are rising following the cancellation of NEET-UG 2026 due to a question paper leak. A parliamentary panel, led by Congress leader Digvijaya Singh, has summoned the National Testing ...

item.title: Interior CS Murkomen Promises Action After Artist Suffered Burn Injuries In Political Attack
item.description: On Sunday, Interior CS Kipchumba Murkomen visited artist Rachel Wandetto at Kenyatta National Hospital following a horrific attack in Kasarani, Nairobi, where she was reportedly doused with petrol and...

item.title: Scott Jennings expresses concern over Trump’s $1.776 billion DOJ fund for allies
item.description: Scott Jennings, a longtime GOP political consultant and CNN commentator, voiced concerns about a newly established $1.776 billion fund linked to former President Donald Trump. The fund, part of a $10 ...

item.title: Muhammad Shehada Discusses Ongoing Challenges and Resilience of Palestinians in Gaza
item.description: On Nakba Day, Palestinians around the world reflect on the forced displacement that occurred 78 years ago during the establishment of the state of Israel. Muhammad Shehada, a Palestinian writer origin...

item.title: Botswana, Namibia, South Africa and Zimbabwe aim to co-host 2028 Afcon
item.description: Botswana, Namibia, South Africa and Zimbabwe have officially submitted a joint bid to host the 2028 Africa Cup of Nations, which would be a first for the continent with four nations running the tourna...

item.title: Pakistan explores blockchain-based tokenisation for sovereign bonds and Naya Pakistan Certificates
item.description: Pakistan is exploring the use of blockchain technology to modernise its financial system by issuing Naya Pakistan Certificates (NPCs) and sovereign bonds as Digitally Native Notes (DNNs). A high-level...

item.title: Federal High Court grants ₦100m bail to ex-Kaduna Governor Nasir El-Rufai with strict conditions
item.description: The Federal High Court for Abuja don grant former Kaduna State Governor, Nasir El-Rufai, bail wey be ₦100 million, but e no come easy. Justice Abdulmalik set strict conditions wey both El-Rufai and hi...

item.title: Finance Bill debate must include accountability on public spending
item.description: The Finance Bill debate in Kenya this year has stirred a lot of discussion, but experts argue that the conversation is missing a crucial piece: how government funds are actually spent. National Treasu...

item.title: Over 5 Million Filipinos Complete Registration for Barangay and SK Elections
item.description: As of May 16, 2026, voter registration for the upcoming barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections on November 2 has reached nearly 5.2 million, according to the Commission on Elections (Comelec...

item.title: Abuja Court Grants Bail To Blogger Chidiebere 'Justice Crack' Over Cybercrime Case
item.description: The Federal High Court for Abuja don grant bail to blogger Chidiebere Justice Mark, known as 'Justice Crack', for N5 million with one surety wey also go put up N5 million. The Department of State Serv...

item.title: Opposition stages walkout in National Assembly demanding medical facilities for Imran Khan
item.description: ISLAMABAD: On Monday, opposition lawmakers from PTI created a scene inside the National Assembly by staging a strong protest. They were demanding proper medical care for their party founder and former...

item.title: Seeman Confirms NTK to Contest Independently in 2029 Lok Sabha Polls
item.description: Naam Tamilar Katchi (NTK) chief coordinator Seeman has affirmed that his party will contest independently in all 40 Lok Sabha constituencies in Tamil Nadu and Puducherry for the 2029 General Elections...

item.title: The Friendship of James Dean and Elizabeth Taylor on the Set of 'Giant'
item.description: During the filming of the 1955 movie 'Giant' in Marfa, Texas, James Dean and Elizabeth Taylor developed a profound and memorable friendship. Both young stars at the time, they bonded over late-night c...

item.title: Squadron Leader Saanya Becomes First Woman Cat-A Qualified Flying Instructor in IAF
item.description: In a historic milestone for the Indian Air Force, Squadron Leader Saanya has become the first woman officer to achieve the Cat-A Qualified Flying Instructor (QFI) rating, which is the highest instruct...

item.title: Toronto Transit Commission and Union Reach Tentative Agreement, Service Disruption Avoided
item.description: Toronto's public transit system has averted a potential service disruption after the Toronto Transit Commission (TTC) reached a tentative agreement with its union. The agreement comes after negotiatio...

item.title: Analysing Public Reactions to the 2026 Budget Tax Reforms
item.description: The 2026 Australian budget has sparked considerable public discussion, particularly regarding proposed tax reforms. While the government argues that these changes aim to streamline taxation and suppor...

item.title: Investigation Underway in Bhopal Dowry Death of Noida Woman Following CCTV Footage
item.description: Fresh CCTV footage has emerged in the case of a 33-year-old Noida woman found dead at her marital home in Bhopal's Katara Hills area on May 12. The videos show the woman climbing the staircase, and la...
